# Chapter 4: Transport networks  (~110 pp)
- 4.1 Modal mix: road, rail, sea, air (15) · 4.2 Urban transport networks (15) · 4.3 Inter-city and freight networks (15) · 4.4 Maritime and shipping (15) · 4.5 Aviation (15) · 4.6 Decarbonising transport (15) · 4.7 Failure section: car-centric urbanism and its costs (20)

**Archetype**: transport, scaling, ethics. **Project**: redesign one transport corridor in the reader's region; document trade-offs. **Exercises**: 25.
